message:
fix: use real semantic embeddings for image similarity demo

Replace hash-based embeddings with all-MiniLM-L6-v2 text embeddings
of the Unsplash AI descriptions. Images with similar content (e.g.
dogs, landscapes, architecture) now cluster together in similarity
search. Dimension changed from 512 to 384 to match the model.

files.patch:
@@ -10,8 +10,8 @@

TurboQuant Image Similarity

-

Click any image to find similar ones. CLIP embeddings compressed 6.4x with TurboQuant.

-

2,000 Unsplash photos. Similarity computed via tq.dot() directly on compressed 512-dim vectors.

+

Click any image to find similar ones. Description embeddings compressed 6.2x with TurboQuant.

+

1,000 Unsplash photos. Similarity computed via tq.dot() directly on compressed 384-dim vectors.

@@ -32,8 +32,8 @@

turboquant-wasm

🖼
Image Similarity
- Click any photo to find similar ones. 2K Unsplash images with - CLIP embeddings compressed 6.4x. Instant search via tq.dot(). + Click any photo to find similar ones. 1K Unsplash images with + description embeddings compressed 6.2x. Instant search via tq.dot().
